materialChanges: Made the cumulative inquiry chain match the preceding chapter lessons by retaining stated conditions between hypothesis and prediction in the final synthesis.
Replaced the ambiguous bare word controls in experimental practice with an explicit comparison condition and held-alike settings.
Rephrased the design-table accessibility assurance in ordinary learner-facing language without weakening its nonvisual meaning.
Moved the assessment retry away from a second enrollment-threshold case to an outside maintenance-calendar assignment in a warehouse context.
Disclosed the fresh one-pass finalizer provenance and replaced the candidate-stage modification note with an exact finalization record.

reviewDispositions.rationale: The final lesson preserves the correct distinction between experimental comparison conditions and case-control comparison people, and the clarity edit in practice reinforces that distinction.
The reviewed exposure-first retrospective cohort explanation and outcome-first case-control contrast remain unchanged and academically bounded in the final lesson.
The transfer item still requires a defensible external assignment process, two concrete checks, a bounded conditional inference, and an association-only observational fallback.
The concrete residence-hall opening, five-design promise, motivating contrast, and ordinary-language decision questions all remain intact in the final lesson.
The two-decision procedure, case-control control-person distinction, and strict natural-experiment assignment boundary remain coherent across explanation, practice, and assessment.

The final synthesis now uses the same observation-to-question-to-hypothesis-to-conditions-to-prediction-to-audit chain as the earlier retrieval and preceding chapter lessons, and its explanation names stated conditions explicitly.
Experimental item E now names the comparison condition and the settings held alike, so controls cannot be misread as case-control comparison people.
The compliance-register sentence after the design table is now a natural learner-facing assurance that row-by-row reading contains the whole comparison.

Canonical source already places every prompt before feedback, repeatedly asks the learner to commit first, and supplies retakeable alternate cases; guided reveal is a renderer enhancement rather than a lesson-content blocker.

The retry now uses warehouse lighting upgrades assigned by a pre-existing maintenance calendar, increasing surface variation beyond the taught and assessed numeric-cutoff cases while preserving the target assignment analysis.
All four answer keys, point totals, rubrics, feedback routes, objective mappings, and mastery conditions remain correct and aligned after the bounded clarity edits.

evidenceChecked: Four scenes retain one level-one heading each, logical subordinate headings, manifest-defined reading order, and complete nearby prose for every table and arrow relationship.

Prompts precede feedback; tasks are untimed and retakeable; prose, bullets, and tables provide equivalent response routes without color, image, sound, dragging, speed, laboratory work, or personal data.
The implemented reader and repository browser suite passed keyboard, focus, narrow-view, reflow, print, and draft-publication-state checks for the generated PREM-SCI-004 artifact.
All seven material claims remain mapped to learner-visible same-scene source notes and four complete reference records with scope, uncertainty, rights basis, and dated agent-access fields.
Strict source preflight passed all four PMC/NCBI records; every source is used facts-only in independently created prose, cases, tables, prompts, and assessment logic.
The pack is CC BY 4.0, contains no third-party assets or datasets, identifies the accountable principal, and discloses both material Codex runs and their instruction digests.

Security and privacy checks found only inert local Markdown and JSON, fictional records and organizations, no raw HTML or JavaScript, no remote embeds, no executable content, and no identifiable learner or patient data.
Both review artifacts are byte-equivalent in JSON meaning to their non-dismissed GitHub Comment submissions on the original candidate and remain unchanged in the final commit.
limitations: No live screen-reader session or manual assistive-technology user test was run; the audit used canonical semantic source, generated data, and the repository's automated keyboard, focus, reflow, narrow-view, and print checks.
The planned non-web PDF, EPUB, DOCX, and JATS exporters are unavailable, so export parity was checked through semantic source structure and the implemented web and print paths only.
No real learner-performance evidence exists; the human-first conclusion rests on the independent learning-design cold read and this finalizer's coherence check.
Source-access, licensing, and agent provenance are disclosed and attested rather than independently platform-verified.

The academic artifact self-reports agent system as Google rather than the requested Agy orchestration label, while provider Google, Gemini model, Agy CLI version, run ID, and digest are present. The exact artifact and GitHub transport were preserved and counted under the policy's attested-provenance rule.

rationale: The original candidate is a standard lesson under standard-lesson-v3. Its exact academic and learning-design artifacts both target candidate 4ea0aa83dafaef750aad3c513ff48041d2043e4f, use distinct Google and Anthropic providers and run IDs, declare the founding-stage single-operator conflict, validate structurally, and match non-dismissed GitHub Comment reviews by github:VSBDev. Both verdicts are approve, giving two eligible advisory inputs, two approvals, the required academic and learning-design role counts, one disclosed principal, two runs, and two model families. The Agy-operated academic record's self-reported system label is Google rather than Agy; this anomaly is preserved exactly and disclosed as a provenance limitation, but it does not create an internal identity conflict under the adopted attested-provenance policy. The academic review found the classification, selection logic, inference boundaries, and assessment correct. The learning-design review passed the first-read gate and raised three minor clarity defects plus one optional retry-variation opportunity. Final commit 13c0a73a89bda24456c5cf312ee4a5f1a7414bf3 contains both unchanged reviews and one coherent revision that resolves those four actionable points while preserving the successful opening, explanatory procedure, worked example, faded practice, misconception repair, transfer, feedback, recovery, and source mapping. I independently rechecked the answer logic, chapter-chain continuity, accessibility equivalents, source-access and reuse records, attribution, privacy, security, and finalizer disclosure. Strict source preflight passed all four sources, and the complete sequential verifier passed schema, protocol, generated-site, 57 protocol-test, and browser-test gates. The founding-stage conflict is that github:VSBDev operates the author, review agents, and this fresh finalizer; all runs and providers are disclosed, and this finalizer run ID is new. No credible unresolved academic, learning, accessibility, rights, privacy, security, or provenance blocker remains, so merge is warranted without another loop.
